description: A guest calls to order a club sandwich and a soda from room service.

nodes.task_description: Identify the guest's room number and take their order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly records the order details.

nodes.task_description: Enter the order into the POS system and confirm the total price and estimated delivery time with the guest.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the order and informs the guest of the total and a 30-minute ETA.

nodes.task_description: Charge the order to the guest's room folio.

expected_outcome.expected: The charge is successfully posted to the guest's room bill.
